# Servers Inventory Summary

Get servers' summary information.

Use command options for servers' filtering and information shown in summary.

Use -o|--output for desired output format.

## Base output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_summary.base:iserver.output.default
```

## Extended output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_summary.all:iserver.output.default
```

Developer output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_summary.all:devel.debug
```
